package: Zeno Resource Machine high-assurance specification package
status: reviewed scoped ZRM-L0 implementation plus candidate WP0 assurance extensions, pre-RFC WP2 policy model, WP3a structural resource roles, and WP3b intrinsic resource construction; no release or production claim
implementation_snapshot: reviewed initial repository-local WP0 controls and WP1 canonical-codec slice; locally evidenced candidate WP0 quality/SBOM/CBOM controls; unreviewed WP2 policy-model, WP3a structural-role, and WP3b intrinsic-resource candidates
manifest_scope: normative specification-package payload only; code, tests, worklogs, and evidence records are outside this inventory
license: MIT; LICENSE is a hashed payload

archive_digest.reason: The manifest is inside the archive; publish the archive SHA-256 as detached release metadata

non_claims: no complete semantic kernel; WP3a is structural and WP3b establishes only policy-independent intrinsic resource facts
ResourceWireV1 is a frozen-draft WP1 codec; IntrinsicResourceV1 adds no new canonical ABI, and there is no stable package-wide ABI
no final policy-valid ResourceV1; zero-quantity marker permission is not expressible by the current policy schema
no canonical policy bytes, policy hashes, authenticated policy activation, or trusted validation context
no complete policy migration or rollback design
no privacy or physical-resource truth claim
